# LivestockInsurance.co.nz

> NZ's Independent Livestock Insurance Comparison. Free expert advice from licensed NZ rural insurance advisers.

Last Updated: May 2026

## About This Site

LivestockInsurance.co.nz is an independent livestock insurance comparison and referral service for New Zealand farmers. We connect farmers with licensed NZ rural insurance advisers who compare FMG, Aon, Gallagher, NZI, and specialist brokers.

We are part of the Cover4You Group. We do not sell insurance directly.

## Livestock Types Covered

- Cattle Insurance (beef and dairy)
- Sheep Insurance (commercial flocks, stud rams)
- Deer Insurance (velvet stags, breeding hinds)
- Goat Insurance (dairy, meat, Angora)
- Pig Insurance (commercial and breeding)
- Alpaca & Llama Insurance (specialist)
- Poultry Insurance (commercial and backyard)
- Rare Breeds & Show Animals

## Coverage Types

- Livestock Mortality Cover
- Disease & Illness Cover
- Livestock Transit Insurance
- Natural Disaster Cover
- Farm & Livestock Liability
- Livestock Theft Cover

## Providers Compared

- FMG (Farmers Mutual Group) — NZ market leader ~65-70% share
- Aon New Zealand — global broker, Lloyd's access
- Gallagher Insurance — specialist exotic livestock
- NZI — competitive farm packs

## Contact

Email: hello@cover4you.co.nz
Website: https://livestockinsurance.co.nz
